fields.name: productCategory
fields.label: Product Category
fields.defaultValue: @SQL=SELECT MAX(M_PRODUCT_CATEGORY_ID) FROM M_PRODUCT_CATEGORY WHERE AD_ISORGINCLUDED(@AD_ORG_ID@, AD_ORG_ID, @#AD_CLIENT_ID@) <> -1 AND ISDEFAULT = 'Y' AND AD_CLIENT_ID = @#AD_CLIENT_ID@ AND ISSUMMARY='N'

derivation.source: SELECT MAX(M_PRODUCT_CATEGORY_ID) FROM M_PRODUCT_CATEGORY WHERE AD_ISORGINCLUDED(@AD_ORG_ID@, AD_ORG_ID, @#AD_CLIENT_ID@) <> -1 AND ISDEFAULT = 'Y' AND AD_CLIENT_ID = @#AD_CLIENT_ID@ AND ISSUMMARY='N'

fields.name: lineNo
fields.label: Line No.
fields.defaultValue: @SQL=SELECT COALESCE(MAX(Line),0)+10 AS DefaultValue FROM M_Product_BOM WHERE M_Product_ID=@M_Product_ID@

derivation.source: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(Line),0)+10 AS DefaultValue FROM M_Product_BOM WHERE M_Product_ID=@M_Product_ID@

fields.name: sequenceNumber
fields.label: Sequence Number
fields.defaultValue: @SQL=SELECT COALESCE(MAX(SEQNO),0)+10 AS DefaultValue FROM M_PRODUCT_CH WHERE m_product_id=@m_product_id@

derivation.source: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(SEQNO),0)+10 AS DefaultValue FROM M_PRODUCT_CH WHERE m_product_id=@m_product_id@
